title: diarthron antoniniae
side_effects: Diarthron antoniniae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps due to its emetic properties. In severe cases, it may also lead to dehydration, electrolyte imbalance, and even kidney damage if not monitored closely. Prolonged or excessive use can result in respiratory issues, such as shortness of breath and increased heart rate, as the body overcompensates for the toxins being eliminated. Additionally, it may interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions like hypertension and cardiovascular disease.
